title: Tumor infiltrating lymphocytes as a predictor of adjuvant avelumab efficacy in patients with high-risk triple negative breast cancer.
abstract: We aimed to investigate the prognostic and predictive value of tumor infiltrating lymphocytes (TILs) for adjuvant immunotherapy in high-risk early TNBC.
trial_name: Real-world clinical outcomes with first-line avelumab in laMCC/mMCC in the USA
